scripts.publish:local: bun run publish:local:core && bun run publish:local:plugin
scripts.test:e2e: bun run e2e/playwright/pre-setup.ts test.local && PLAYWRIGHT_PROJECT_NAME=local bunx playwright test --project=local
scripts.test:e2e:stage: bun run e2e/playwright/pre-setup.ts test.stage && PLAYWRIGHT_PROJECT_NAME=stage bunx playwright test --project=stage
scripts.test:e2e:prod: bun run e2e/playwright/pre-setup.ts test.prod && PLAYWRIGHT_PROJECT_NAME=prod bunx playwright test --project=prod
scripts.test:e2e:headed: bun run e2e/playwright/pre-setup.ts test.local && PLAYWRIGHT_PROJECT_NAME=local PLAYWRIGHT_HEADED=true bunx playwright test --project=local
